text: This is just a quick video kind of highlighting how you get instruments inside the chest wall or inside an abdomen if you're doing laparoscopic surgery or indeed in this case robotic surgery.

So you can see some kind of light pressure on the chest wall there which you can see with the camera so you know you're in the right space and you're not going to hit any ribs and you just kind of cut a little hole through and you push a port through.
It's kind of like a big boring drill.

and then what you can do is you can place instruments through these ports into the chest so for example here we just have a small diathermy stick in order to remove some adhesions and then you can later on hook up the robot to these ports and you can use staplers, clips, knives, you can suture, you can see a spatula there and some Maryland forceps and you can move the lung tissue around.
